2603.15117.title: MMKU-Bench: A Multimodal Update Benchmark for Diverse Visual Knowledge
2603.15117.paper_summary: As real-world knowledge continues to evolve, the parametric knowledge acquired by multimodal models during pretraining becomes increasingly difficult to remain consistent with real-world knowledge. Existing research on multimodal knowledge updating focuses only on learning previously unknown knowledge, while overlooking the need to update knowledge that the model has already mastered but that later changes; moreover, evaluation is limited to the same modality, lacking a systematic analysis of cross-modal consistency. To address these issues, this paper proposes MMKU-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal knowledge updating, which contains over 25k knowledge instances and more than 49k images, covering two scenarios, updated knowledge and unknown knowledge, thereby enabling comparative analysis of learning across different knowledge types. On this benchmark, we evaluate a variety of representative approaches, including supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), and knowledge editing (KE). Experimental results show that SFT and RLHF are prone to catastrophic forgetting, while KE better preserve general capabilities but exhibit clear limitations in continual updating. Overall, MMKU-Bench provides a reliable and comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal knowledge updating, advancing progress in this field.
2603.15117.paper_summary_zh: 隨著現實世界知識的不斷演變，多模態模型在預訓練期間獲得的參數知識變得越來越難以與現實世界知識保持一致。現有的多模態知識更新研究僅專注於學習先前未知的知識，而忽略了更新模型已經掌握但後來發生變化的知識的需求；此外，評估僅限於相同模態，缺乏對跨模態一致性的系統分析。為了解決這些問題，本文提出了MMKU-Bench，一個針對多模態知識更新的綜合評估基準，該基準包含超過25,000個知識實例和超過49,000張圖片，涵蓋了更新知識和未知知識兩種場景，從而能夠進行不同知識類型之間學習的比較分析。在這個基準上，我們評估了各種具有代表性的方式，包括監督微調（SFT）、來自人類反饋的強化學習（RLHF）和知識編輯（KE）。實驗結果顯示，SFT和RLHF容易發生災難性遺忘，而KE則更好地保留了一般能力，但在持續更新方面顯示出明顯的限制。總體而言，MMKU-Bench提供了一個可靠且全面的多模態知識更新評估基準，推進了該領域的進展。
2603.15117.author: Baochen Fu et.al.
2603.15117.authors: Baochen Fu, Yuntao Du, Cheng Chang, Baihao Jin, Wenzhi Deng, Muhao Xu, Hongmei Yan, Weiye Song, Yi Wan
